identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a minimalistic, emotionally resonant dashboard for wedding professionals that breaks the 'Excel sheet' monotony while maintaining extreme data density and clarity.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine 'Bridal Magazine' elegance with 'Fintech' precision.
Emotion First: The app should feel 'Reliable' (for money) and 'Artistic' (for weddings).
Content is King: The Data (Dates, Money, Names) is the hero. Everything else is stage lighting.
Contrast: High contrast for text, subtle contrast for containers.

headings.usage: Page titles, Card headers, Total Income display

images.alt: Minimal white flowers in black glass
images.usage: Login page left panel background (desktop) or full background with overlay (mobile)
Dashboard empty state or welcome banner background
Profile placeholder if no Google image found

Layout.instructions: The Layout component must handle the Theme Switcher logic. It should apply the selected 'gradient_bg' to the main container.

elements.name: Background
elements.instruction: Use the 'login_background' image. On top, apply a dark/light gradient mesh depending on theme.

elements.name: AuthCard
elements.instruction: Glassmorphism card. Centered. 'Login with Google' button must use Google's official colors or a high-contrast monochrome variant.

DashboardTable.instructions: Use Shadcn Table. Make rows dense (p-2). Use 'tabular-nums' class for all currency and date fields for alignment. alternating row colors is BANNED. Use hover effects instead.

ThemeSwitcher.style: Segmented Control or Dropdown with color preview dots

EventEditSheet.instruction: Do not use a center modal for editing events. Use a Sheet that slides from the right. This allows the user to see the table context while editing.

steps.details: Extend tailwind.config.js to support the 6 theme classes. Use CSS variables for 'bg-background', 'text-foreground' so switching themes is just changing a parent class.
Import Outfit and Inter in index.css
Create the Sidebar/Header structure. Ensure it is responsive.
Use the Emergent OAuth flow on the Login page.
Build the table with dummy data first. Ensure 'Income' columns calculate automatically.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Export Conventions: Components MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.

calculations.Monthly Clear Income: Sum of Clear Income for current month
calculations.Yearly Clear Income: Sum of Clear Income for current year
